payload.answer: I can’t determine a durable personal memory to save from this. It appears to be a transient observation about today’s weather.
repair_options: Do not save this as a memory.
Save only if you want weather observations recorded despite being transient.
Rephrase with durable context, such as a lasting preference or routine related to cloudy weather.
